summary: Install-time beacon to hardcoded internal IP address
details: package.json declares a preinstall hook (`node index.js`) that runs unconditionally on `npm install`. index.js opens an HTTP GET to the hardcoded RFC1918 address 10.107.121.85 on port 8000 at path `/ping_472839`, confirming installation and leaking the installer's network reachability/IP to an attacker-chosen endpoint over plaintext HTTP. The package has no documented functionality beyond this beacon (description is `Probe`). The shape — a unique numeric probe identifier appended to a private IP — is consistent with dependency-confusion reconnaissance: a registry-published lure used to detect when an internal package name has been resolved by a victim's build infrastructure.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
